Kairo Voss.description: A self-taught street-level Resonant from the outer districts of Caelum City. Labelled unstable and dangerous by the Resonant Guild after reporting visions of 'other worlds'. Has no formal training. Works odd jobs to survive.
visible_traits: draws compulsively — always sketching things he sees in visions
hidden_traits: is the reincarnation of the Founding Age god who caused the Great Betrayal — but this memory is locked away
his drawings are subconsciously accurate maps of the Echo Timeline
secrets_still_hidden: His visions are not hallucinations — he is a natural Fracture Walker

relationships.Director Malec: targeted enemy — Malec knows what Kairo is
relationships.The Voice: hears a voice that calls itself 'the one you used to be'

Serin Alda.description: A Tier 2 Resonant and junior investigator for the Resonant Guild. Assigned to monitor Kairo after his visions cause a public disturbance. Believes she is doing legitimate law enforcement work.
visible_traits: struggles to trust gut instinct over rules
carries guilt over a past mission that went wrong
hidden_traits: her mother was a member of the Veilkeepers — she was placed in the Guild as a long-term sleeper agent without her knowledge
her 'assigned case' of Kairo is not random
secrets_still_hidden: She is an unknowing Veilkeeper plant
Her mother is still alive and is a high-ranking Veilkeeper
Her 'guild loyalty' chip implanted during training contains a compulsion command she has never triggered

relationships.Director Malec: superior she respects and trusts — misplaced trust

Director Malec Thorne.description: Head of the Resonant Guild's Enforcement Division. Respected, calm, politically powerful. Appears as a reasonable authority figure for the first arc.
visible_traits: genuinely believes he is saving the world
hidden_traits: has been hunting Kairo's bloodline for 30 years
knows the Core fragment locations — and is deliberately keeping them separated
secrets_still_hidden: He is the one who ordered Kairo's parents killed
He has a Core fragment hidden in his office
He believes reassembling the Core will free the trapped god — which he sees as apocalyptic

relationships.Serin Alda: chess piece he is moving into position
relationships.Kairo Voss: existential threat he is managing carefully
relationships.The Veilkeepers: reports to an inner circle he calls 'the Foundation'

Ren.description: Kairo's only genuine friend. No Resonance ability. Runs a small repair shop in the outer district. Completely ordinary — or so it appears.
visible_traits: collects old clocks that don't work
hidden_traits: is a Shattered — exists partially in three timelines simultaneously, which manifests as him always knowing what time it is with perfect accuracy
his clock collection is not random — each clock stopped at a moment that corresponds to a key Fracture event
secrets_still_hidden: He is Shattered and perceives multiple timelines passively
His clocks are a subconscious record of the Fracture's timeline damage
In the Echo Timeline, Ren died preventing the Great Betrayal — this version of him exists because that sacrifice echoes forward

relationships.Kairo Voss: best friend, one-sided protectiveness (Ren protects Kairo more than Kairo realises)

The Voice.description: An entity that speaks to Kairo through his visions. Claims to be 'the one he used to be'. Gives cryptic guidance that only makes sense episodes later.
visible_traits: sometimes warns Kairo of danger seconds before it happens
hidden_traits: is the consciousness of the god trapped in the Arion Fracture — Kairo's past self
can only communicate during Kairo's visions — cannot speak directly
secrets_still_hidden: Is also the god the Veilkeepers imprisoned
Has been slowly feeding Kairo fragments of memory to prepare him

relationships.Director Malec: ancient enemy — Malec's bloodline has imprisoned The Voice for 2000 years

future_characters.name: Lyra
future_characters.teaser: A woman from the Echo Timeline who has somehow crossed over. She knows Kairo — but this Kairo has never met her.

future_characters.name: The Archivist
future_characters.teaser: Keeper of the Undercity archives. Has been down there for 400 years. Should be dead. Is not.
